context_updates.description: Per-dimension knowledge updates. Omit entirely if no changes.

add.description: New insights discovered during this review.

header.description: Short label (5-10 words) identifying this insight.

description.description: 1-3 sentences explaining WHY, not WHAT. Focus on rationale, tradeoff, or invariant.

settled.description: True = confirmed intentional, future reviews should not re-investigate.

positive.description: True = positive pattern/characteristic/design decision that serves developers well.

remove.description: Headers of insights to remove (no longer true).

settle.description: Headers of insights to mark as settled (confirmed intentional).

unsettle.description: Headers of insights to unsettle (need re-investigation).

add.description: rel(), loc() are deliberately terse — high-frequency helpers where brevity aids readability at call sites. Full names would add noise without improving clarity.
